summary: Testing completed for 3 changes: 1) Garden Designer disabled - route and link removed, 2) Date range search added to Expense Periods tab, 3) Expense period update bug fix verified - name updates immediately after save. All 8 test features passed.
passed_tests: Garden Designer: route /projects/:id/garden-designer redirects to landing page (disabled)
Garden Designer: no link to Garden Designer visible in project detail page (7 feature cards shown, no garden-designer)
Expense Periods: date range search with From/To month inputs is visible (data-testid='period-search-start', 'period-search-end')
Expense Periods: filtering by date range works correctly (client-side filter: end_month >= searchStart AND start_month <= searchEnd)
Expense Periods: Clear button appears when filters are active (data-testid='period-search-clear')
Expense Periods: counter shows 'Showing X of Y periods' when filtering
Expense Period Update: after editing a period's name, the card immediately reflects the new name (verified with 'TEST_Budget_Period_2026' -> 'TEST_Budget_Period_2026_UPDATED')
Backend API: PUT /api/budget/periods/{id} correctly updates period and returns updated data
critical_code_review_comments: App.js: GardenDesignerPage import and route correctly commented out with preservation note
ProjectDetailPage.jsx: featureCards array correctly excludes garden-designer (7 cards: diary, gallery, blog, library, tasks, startup, checklists)
FinancePage.jsx: periodSearchStart/periodSearchEnd state and filteredExpensePeriods computed correctly
FinancePage.jsx: handleSavePeriod correctly uses 'await fetchExpensePeriods()' to refresh data after update
Date range filter logic is correct: periods where end_month >= searchStart AND start_month <= searchEnd
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data: '2026 Budget' and 'TEST_Budget_Period_2026' periods
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three changes verified: 1) Garden Designer disabled - import/route commented in App.js, link removed from ProjectDetailPage.jsx featureCards array. 2) Date range search in Expense Periods tab - uses periodSearchStart/periodSearchEnd state, filteredExpensePeriods computed, Clear button and counter visible. Key test IDs: period-search-start, period-search-end, period-search-clear. 3) Period update bug fixed - handleSavePeriod uses 'await fetchExpensePeriods()' to refresh data immediately. Test periods: '2026 Budget' (id: 22919cb1-b902-48c4-94ec-d0d8680b2a30), 'TEST_Budget_Period_2026' (id: 478094ad-0e31-4136-baa8-46d24cc4b358).
